purpose: synthetic known-ratio mixtures for computational mixed-host DETECTION testing
read_id_provenance: MAJ_<host>_<k> / MIN_<host>_<k> encodes the source host per read
caveat: In-silico mixtures test computational detection/regression only. They do NOT validate blood-volume quantification, extraction/PCR/primer bias, DNA degradation, or the read-fraction<->blood-proportion relationship. Read fractions remain support evidence; host_fractions_benchmarked stays false until wet-lab known-ratio controls exist (docs/mixed_host_control_protocol.md).
